title: In the hour of trial
textAttribution: Text: James Montgomery (1771–1854), Frances A. Hutton (1789–1871).
publicDomainBasis: James Montgomery (1771–1854), Frances A. Hutton (1789–1871), Spencer Lane (1843–1903). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
In the hour of trial,
Jesus, plead for me,
Lest by base denial,
I depart from Thee;
When Thou seest me waver,
With a look recall,
Nor for fear or favor
Suffer me to fall.

sections.label: Verse 2
Verse 3
sections.text:
When the last hour cometh,
Fraught with strife and pain,
When Thou, Lord, returneth
To the earth again;
On Thy truth relying
As that hour draws near,
Jesus, take me, waiting,
To Thy presence dear.
